'''''Iron Fist''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
While under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Zsinj]], Zsinj developed the tactic of fending off a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] attack by flying the ship through an asteroid field—when the fighters moved in to attack, the ship would target asteroids close to the fighters with its [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], causing them to explode and damage or destroy nearby fighters.<ref name="X-Wing: Solo Command">''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''</ref>

When Zsinj was promoted to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] and received a new flagship, the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''Brawl'', which he renamed to [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] after this original ship. The ''Victory''-class ''Iron Fist'' was later assigned to Captain [[Ferob]] under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], where it was involved in Thrawn's pacification of [[UR41-284]].
